Sway_Type_Description: Change a Character or Descendant Proficiency for another one.
Change a Score by +/-2 or +/-1 Pip
Change small details such as Colouration, Timbre, Logos, Brands, Tone, etc. Change a description (Diegesis) a bit.
Minor changes, stretch, bend, reposition, alter dates of events, change a specific use or meaning of a specific word (often slang usage).

Minor Shape-shifting (makeup, prosthetics etc but same casting), re-arrange positions, revise remembered minor personal events (personal retcon). Change individual words, company logos, symbols while preserving general meaning, (minor retcon)- minor Mandela Effect

Moderate Shape-shifting (including recasting the actor), re-arrange positions, alter remembered personal events. Change word, logo and symbolic meanings, (medium retcon), minor social changes - medium Mandela Effect

Major Shape-shifting of self (recasting as different ethnicity), geographical changes to your Locations, minor social changes, alter meanings of sentences (transformative grammar), retcon personal history or unimportant social events - Major Mandela Effect
Major Shape-shifting (recasting as a different species), geographical changes, retcon important historical, political, economic or social events - Major Mandela Effects
Alter a species details or anatomy, redraw maps, rewrite history, alter Facet Sway Potency Levels for a new Era.
Locally alter dimensions, change direction of gravity, distort Cartesian space.
Alter major social conventions, languages, nature of leadership, etc.
Alter physical laws, properties, nature of existence etc.
